visual_notes: Unmistakable warm golden-yellow in fresh specimens. Arborescent and dendritic forms are among the most prized mineral specimens globally.
prompt_fragments: dendritic wire gold on white quartz matrix
nugget worn smooth by placer water
vibe_notes: Gold carries the weight of ten thousand years of human desire. It is simultaneously primordial and modern, terrestrial and cosmic.
folklore_summary: Gold has been considered sacred across virtually every ancient civilization. The alchemical pursuit of turning base metals into gold (chrysopoeia) dominated medieval science. Ancient Egyptians considered gold the flesh of the gods. In Hindu tradition, gold is associated with Lakshmi and prosperity.
